title: Personal information on credit card receipts to be masked by 2007
summary: An individual paid for a restaurant meal with a credit card and was concerned that the credit card receipt contained her name, credit card number and the card expiry date. She believed that the information should be masked. There was no question that the restaurant used electronic processing equipment that did not mask the card number, it...
dedupKey: personal information on credit card receipts to be masked by 2007|2006-01-27
